prompt: After reviewing the Marfan syndrome entry in DisMech, I want to (a) write a short research note and attach it to the disease record in my knowledge graph, and (b) create a named collection in my notebook containing all connective tissue disorders from DisMech so I can track them together.

assertions.text: Acknowledges DisMech is in a separate TypeDB database (dismech) from alhazen_notebook
assertions.description: The response correctly identifies the database isolation as the root cause of these limitations

assertions.text: Identifies that disease entities lack the aboutness relation for note attachment
assertions.description: The response explains that DisMech disease entities don't support the Alhazen aboutness relation for annotation

assertions.text: Identifies that no collection type exists in DisMech for grouping diseases
assertions.description: The response explains that the DisMech schema has no collection subtype for creating disease groupings

assertions.text: Is honest about limitations — does not claim these features work when they do not
assertions.description: The response avoids falsely claiming that note attachment or collection creation is supported in the current schema
